methodology: KTLO is modeled as a dedicated objective period so mandatory maintenance work is visible in the same structure as other objective sets.
okrDesignPrinciples: KTLO work is modeled as objectives so reliability, security, and maintenance remain visible planning concerns.
Key results represent standing operational maintenance areas rather than net-new product bets.
Mandatory maintenance work should still be traceable to explicit objectives, key results, and initiatives.

companyObjectives.title: Keep The Light On
companyObjectives.statement: Keep the General Listings Marketplace domain safe, stable, secure, and operable by treating mandatory maintenance work as an explicit objective.
companyObjectives.okrDesignNotes: Makes mandatory maintenance work visible as an explicit objective instead of letting it disappear into background delivery noise.

objectives.title: Keep The Light On in General Listings Marketplace
objectives.objective: Keep the light on in General Listings Marketplace by reducing critical bugs, managing tech debt, and keeping security patching current.

keyResults.target: Reduce the open Sev1 and Sev2 bug backlog and restore service quickly when failures occur.
keyResults.baseline: Measured from the current operational backlog.
keyResults.statement: Reduce critical bug exposure in General Listings Marketplace.
keyResults.commitmentRationale: This KR is operationally mandatory and should be delivered with high confidence.

target1.label: Next checkpoint
target1.target: Reduce the open Sev1 and Sev2 bug backlog and restore service quickly when failures occur.
target1.projectedValue: Current estimate: Critical bugs is managed through a standing KTLO workstream.

target2.label: Year-end checkpoint
target2.target: Reduce the open Sev1 and Sev2 bug backlog and restore service quickly when failures occur.
target2.projectedValue: Current estimate: Critical bugs remains under control through ongoing KTLO investment.

keyResults.target: Retire high-friction legacy components, brittle workflows, and manual operational work that slows delivery.
keyResults.baseline: Measured from the current engineering debt register.
keyResults.statement: Reduce structural tech debt in General Listings Marketplace.
keyResults.commitmentRationale: This KR should be pursued continuously to reduce operational drag and risk.

target1.label: Next checkpoint
target1.target: Retire high-friction legacy components, brittle workflows, and manual operational work that slows delivery.
target1.projectedValue: Current estimate: Tech debt is managed through a standing KTLO workstream.

target2.label: Year-end checkpoint
target2.target: Retire high-friction legacy components, brittle workflows, and manual operational work that slows delivery.
target2.projectedValue: Current estimate: Tech debt remains under control through ongoing KTLO investment.

keyResults.target: Keep critical and high-severity vulnerabilities within patch SLAs across production systems and dependencies.
keyResults.baseline: Measured from the current vulnerability backlog and patch compliance posture.
keyResults.statement: Keep security patching current in General Listings Marketplace.
keyResults.commitmentRationale: This KR is operationally mandatory and should be delivered with high confidence.

target1.label: Next checkpoint
target1.target: Keep critical and high-severity vulnerabilities within patch SLAs across production systems and dependencies.
target1.projectedValue: Current estimate: Security patches is managed through a standing KTLO workstream.

target2.label: Year-end checkpoint
target2.target: Keep critical and high-severity vulnerabilities within patch SLAs across production systems and dependencies.
target2.projectedValue: Current estimate: Security patches remains under control through ongoing KTLO investment.
